title: OpenAI's Math AI: Solves Erdős problem in hours — Apr 15
summary: OpenAI's latest model reportedly solves a longstanding mathematics problem, signaling a new era for AI in science. Meanwhile, Meta deploys a new inference scaling system called SOLARIS, boosting ad revenue by nearly 0.7%. In hardware, China's Dishan Technology reports a 2nm AI chip design breakthrough.
